case_title: ANNE LAWRENCE VS. MONKEY ON CHESTNUT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-03-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANNE LAWRENCE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MONKEY ON CHESTNUT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,200.00 FILED BY LAWRENCE, ANNE AS TO DEFENDANT MONKEY ON CHESTNUT OWNER ROBERT HEMPHILL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (SERVICE FEE $85.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAWRENCE, ANNE AS TO DEFENDANT MONKEY ON CHESTNUT OWNER ROBERT HEMPHILL

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ANNE LAWRENCE IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MONKEY ON CHESTNUT OWNER ROBERT HEMPHILL. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
